headline: SPG Q1 FFO Tops Estimates, Dividend and Guidance Raised
summary: SPG beats Q1 Real Estate FFO and revenue estimates, raises the 2026 Real Estate FFO outlook and hikes dividend as mall occupancy holds at 96%.

raw.headline: SPG Q1 FFO Tops Estimates, Dividend and Guidance Raised
raw.summary: SPG beats Q1 Real Estate FFO and revenue estimates, raises the 2026 Real Estate FFO outlook and hikes dividend as mall occupancy holds at 96%.

headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on Federal Realty Investment, Raises Price Target to $116
summary: Barclays  analyst Richard Hightower   maintains Federal Realty Investment (NYSE:FRT) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $107 to $116.
